title: Suspected Iranian Drone Hits US Consulate In Dubai | 10 News
description: The US consulate in Dubai has reportedly been attacked after smoke was seen rising from the parking lot.  A US official told the Wall Street Journal that it was a suspected Iranian drone, but the fire has been contained, and there are no reported injuries.  It follows an earlier attack on a US embassy in Saudi Arabia’s capital of Riyadh. title: Israeli Strike On Lebanon's Sidon After Evacuation Orders | 10 News
description: Israel has struck the city of Sidon in Lebanon after the Israeli military issued evacuation orders for the city.  It comes after Iran-backed Lebanese militia, Hezbollah, launched missiles at Israel for a second consecutive day on Tuesday.  Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu says Hezbollah has made a "grave mistake" of dragging the Lebanese people into a war which is not theirs, but that Israel will "continue to do what is necessary" for its defence.  Meanwhile, Iran has launched missile and drone strikes against nearby countries which are allied to the US. title: Kristi Noem Stands By ‘Terrorist’ Claim After Minneapolis ICE Shooting Deaths | 10 News
description: Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem has stood by her claim that two US citizens shot dead by federal immigration officers in Minneapolis, were domestic terrorists.  During a Senate Judiciary Committee hearing, Democrats pressed her to retract the remarks made after the January deaths of Renee Good and Alex Pretti.  Video evidence later cast doubt on those claims, drawing criticism from both Democrats and Republicans.  Noem refused to apologise, saying her comments were based on chaotic reports from agents at the scene.
